title: Speech-Language Pathology Assistant
description: Roche is seeking a Speech-Language Pathology Assistant to support therapeutic services and patient care. You'll assist with therapy delivery, patient assessments, and documentation. Work remotely for a global pharmaceutical company advancing patient care.
responsibilities: Assist speech-language pathologists with patient assessment and treatment
Implement therapeutic exercises under SLP supervision
Maintain accurate treatment records and patient documentation
Prepare therapy materials and therapeutic equipment
Support patient motivation and participation in therapy

requirements.education: High school diploma or equivalent; SLP assistant certification preferred
